Binary search for bbabaababaa
(0, 64, 128): bb <=> ba
(65, 96, 128): bbab <=> bbaa
(97, 112, 128): bbaba <=> bbabb
(97, 104, 112): bbabaab <=> bbabaaa
(105, 108, 112): bbabaa <=> bbabab
(105, 106, 108): bbabaababaa <=> bbabaababaa
Found the pattern at location 24
